name: monsqlize
description: A lightweight MongoDB ORM with multi-level caching, transaction support, distributed features, Saga distributed transactions, unified expression system with 122 operators, and universal function caching (100% MongoDB support)
author: vext.js Team

scripts.test:unit: npm run build && node --test test/unit/expression/expression.test.js test/unit/management/management.test.js
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && node --test test/integration/mongodb/connect.test.js test/integration/mongodb/queries.test.js test/integration/mongodb/management.test.js
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:runtime && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.type-check: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsd --files test/types/root-import.test-d.ts
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run type-check && npm run test
scripts.postpublish: echo '✅ 发布成功！请创建 GitHub Release: https://github.com/vextjs/monSQLize/releases/new?tag=v'$npm_package_version
